title: アルゼンチン共和国杯にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan's friends are all gathered in the
stands at the Copa Republica Argentina.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's Mejiro Palmer, Daitaku Helios, and the
group of students who she's become friends with
recently.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Jordan gets a message from her friends showing
their support, and then heads out to the race.
